222 0,0,390,391,5,1,0,0,391,392,3,64,32,0,392,393,5,2,0,0,393,61,1,0,0,0,
223 394,395,5,27,0,0,395,396,5,1,0,0,396,397,3,64,32,0,397,398,5,2,0,0,398,

225 5,2,0,0,403,405,1,0,0,0,404,394,1,0,0,0,404,399,1,0,0,0,405,63,1,0,0,
226 0,406,407,3,66,33,0,407,408,5,59,0,0,408,410,1,0,0,0,409,406,1,0,0,0,
227 410,413,1,0,0,0,411,409,1,0,0,0,411,412,1,0,0,0,412,414,1,0,0,0,413,411,
228 1,0,0,0,414,415,3,66,33,0,415,65,1,0,0,0,416,417,7,0,0,0,417,67,1,0,0,
229 0,418,419,7,1,0,0,419,69,1,0,0,0,420,426,3,72,36,0,421,424,5,59,0,0,422,
230 425,3,74,37,0,423,425,5,52,0,0,424,422,1,0,0,0,424,423,1,0,0,0,425,427,
231 1,0,0,0,426,421,1,0,0,0,426,427,1,0,0,0,427,71,1,0,0,0,428,429,7,2,0,
232 0,429,73,1,0,0,0,430,431,7,3,0,0,431,75,1,0,0,0,46,77,80,83,86,89,92,
233 95,98,101,111,128,136,156,163,168,172,175,182,186,197,200,206,210,220,
234 228,231,239,247,250,260,277,291,293,320,333,335,347,349,361,367,374,384,
235 404,411,424,426
236 };
237 staticData->serializedATN = antlr4::atn::SerializedATNView(serializedATNSegment, sizeof(serializedATNSegment) / sizeof(serializedATNSegment[0]));
238
239 antlr4::atn::ATNDeserializer deserializer;
240 staticData->atn = deserializer.deserialize(staticData->serializedATN);
241
242 const size_t count = staticData->atn->getNumberOfDecisions();
243 staticData->decisionToDFA.reserve(count);
244 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
245 staticData->decisionToDFA.emplace_back(staticData->atn->getDecisionState(i), i);
246 }
247 uvlcppparserParserStaticData = staticData.release();
248}
249
250}
251
252UVLCppParser::UVLCppParser(TokenStream *input) : UVLCppParser(input, antlr4::atn::ParserATNSimulatorOptions()) {}
253
254UVLCppParser::UVLCppParser(TokenStream *input, const antlr4::atn::ParserATNSimulatorOptions &options) : Parser(input) {
255 UVLCppParser::initialize();
256 _interpreter = new atn::ParserATNSimulator(this, *uvlcppparserParserStaticData->atn, uvlcppparserParserStaticData->decisionToDFA, uvlcppparserParserStaticData->sharedContextCache, options);
257}
258
259UVLCppParser::~UVLCppParser() {
260 delete _interpreter;
261}
262
263const atn::ATN& UVLCppParser::getATN() const {
264 return *uvlcppparserParserStaticData->atn;
265}
266
267std::string UVLCppParser::getGrammarFileName() const {
268 return "UVLCppParser.g4";
269}
270
271const std::vector<std::string>& UVLCppParser::getRuleNames() const {
272 return uvlcppparserParserStaticData->ruleNames;
273}
274
275const dfa::Vocabulary& UVLCppParser::getVocabulary() const {
276 return uvlcppparserParserStaticData->vocabulary;
277}
278
279antlr4::atn::SerializedATNView UVLCppParser::getSerializedATN() const {
280 return uvlcppparserParserStaticData->serializedATN;
281}

4513
4514bool UVLCppParser::sempred(RuleContext *context, size_t ruleIndex, size_t predicateIndex) {
4515 switch (ruleIndex) {
4516 case 21: return constraintSempred(antlrcpp::downCast<ConstraintContext *>(context), predicateIndex);
4517 case 24: return additiveExpressionSempred(antlrcpp::downCast<AdditiveExpressionContext *>(context), predicateIndex);
4518 case 25: return multiplicativeExpressionSempred(antlrcpp::downCast<MultiplicativeExpressionContext *>(context), predicateIndex);
4519
4520 default:
4521 break;
4522 }
4523 return true;
4524}
4525
4526bool UVLCppParser::constraintSempred(ConstraintContext *_localctx, size_t predicateIndex) {
4527 switch (predicateIndex) {
4528 case 0: return precpred(_ctx, 4);
4529 case 1: return precpred(_ctx, 3);
4530 case 2: return precpred(_ctx, 2);
4531 case 3: return precpred(_ctx, 1);
4532
4533 default:
4534 break;
4535 }
4536 return true;
4537}
4538
4539bool UVLCppParser::additiveExpressionSempred(AdditiveExpressionContext *_localctx, size_t predicateIndex) {
4540 switch (predicateIndex) {
4541 case 4: return precpred(_ctx, 3);
4542 case 5: return precpred(_ctx, 2);
4543
4544 default:
4545 break;
4546 }
4547 return true;
4548}
4549
4550bool UVLCppParser::multiplicativeExpressionSempred(MultiplicativeExpressionContext *_localctx, size_t predicateIndex) {
4551 switch (predicateIndex) {
4552 case 6: return precpred(_ctx, 3);
4553 case 7: return precpred(_ctx, 2);
4554
4555 default:
4556 break;
4557 }
4558 return true;
4559}
4560
4561void UVLCppParser::initialize() {

4563 uvlcppparserParserInitialize();
4564#else
4565 ::antlr4::internal::call_once(uvlcppparserParserOnceFlag, uvlcppparserParserInitialize);
4566#endif
4567}
